recommendations.title: Atonement
recommendations.overview: A young girl irrevocably changes the course of several lives when she accuses her older sister's lover of a crime he did not commit.

recommendations.title: Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In May 1940, the fate of World War II hangs on Winston Churchill, who must decide whether to negotiate with Adolf Hitler or fight on knowing that it could mean the end of the British Empire.

recommendations.title: Pride & Prejudice

recommendations.title: The Soloist
recommendations.overview: A Los Angeles journalist befriends a homeless Juilliard-trained musician, while looking for a new article for the paper.

recommendations.title: The Woman in the Window
recommendations.overview: An agoraphobic woman living alone in New York begins spying on her new neighbors only to witness a disturbing act of violence.

recommendations.title: Cyrano

recommendations.title: Pan
